commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And I will set up shepherds over them which shall feed them: and they shall fear no more, nor be dismayed, neither shall they be lacking, says the LORD. Pastors; Zorobabel, as figures of Christ, and of the pastors of his Church. No more, as much as formerly. So many expressions must be understood. Septuagint, "orient. Zorobabel was not chief governor, (Calmet) though at the head of his tribe. (Haydock) The kingdom of Christ was not of this world, John xviii. (Calmet) He alone imparts justice to others. (Worthington).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
